message:
fix(mol): fix role extraction from agent identity for handoff bead lookup

The role extraction used strings.Split(target, "/") and took the last
element, but buildAgentIdentity returns "mayor/" and "deacon/" with
trailing slashes, producing an empty role string. Extract to a shared
helper extractRoleFromIdentity that trims trailing slashes first.

Also improved error messages to show the expected bead title and status
when lookup fails, making diagnosis easier.

Re-pinned the refinery handoff bead (gt-j3cx) which was accidentally
closed during Clown Show #21 stale backlog cleanup.

Closes: gt-43ltj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
